zh.lifeSummary: 當John Sydenham於1383年出生在英國薩默塞特沃謝特時，他的父親Henry De Sydenham20歲，母親Margaret Whitton19歲。他於大約1415年與Margaret Joan Popham在英國薩默塞特沃謝特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1468年4月4日在他的家鄉享年85歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特沃謝特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Sydenham于1383年出生在英国薩默塞特沃謝特时，他的父亲Henry De Sydenham20岁，母亲Margaret Whitton19岁。他于大约1415年与Margaret Joan Popham在英国薩默塞特沃謝特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1468年4月4日在他的家乡享年85岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特沃謝特。

nameMeanings.name: Sydenham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Sydenham in Bridgwater (Somerset), Sydenham Damerel (Devon), and Sydenham (Oxon).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Sydenham was born in 1383, in Watchet, Somerset, England, his father, Henry De Sydenham, was 20 and his mother, Margaret Whitton, was 19. He married Margaret Joan Popham about 1415, in Watchet, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 4 April 1468, in his hometown, at the age of 85, and was buried in Watchet, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Sydenham est né en 1383, à Watchet, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Henry De Sydenham, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Margaret Whitton, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Joan Popham environ 1415, à Watchet, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 4 avril 1468, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterré à Watchet, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Sydenham 1383 in Watchet, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry De Sydenham 20 und seine Mutter Margaret Whitton 19. Er hat um 1415 in Watchet, Somerset, England Margaret Joan Popham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 4. April 1468 im Alter von 85 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Watchet, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Margaret Joan Popham circa 1415, nel Watchet, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 4 aprile 1468, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolto a Watchet, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Sydenhamが1383年にイギリスソメルセトワトチェトで生まれた時，父Henry De Sydenhamは20歳，母Margaret Whittonは19歳であった。約1415年にイギリスソメルセトワトチェトでMargaret Joan Pophamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1468年4月4日に故郷で85歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトワトチェトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Sydenham(이)가 1383년 영국 서머세트 왓쳇에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry De Sydenham(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Whitton(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1415년 영국 서머세트 왓쳇에서 Margaret Joan Popham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1468년 4월 4일 그의 고향에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 왓쳇에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Sydenham nasceu em 1383, em Watchet, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry De Sydenham, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Whitton, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Joan Popham aproximadamente 1415, em Watchet, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 4 de abril de 1468, em sua cidade natal, com 85 anos, e foi sepultado em Watchet, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Sydenham родился в 1383 г. в местности вачет, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry De Sydenham было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Whitton, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Joan Popham около 1415 г. в местности вачет, сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 4 апреля 1468 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 85 лет и был похоронен в местности вачет, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Margaret Joan Popham aproximadamente 1415, en Watchet, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 4 de abril de 1468, en su pueblo, a la edad de 85 años, y fue sepultado en Watchet, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
